verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're more real than the ground I'm standing on You're more real than the wind in my lungs Your thoughts define me, You're inside me You're my reality

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Abba, I belong to You, Abba, I belong to You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're closer than the skin on my bones, You're closer than the song on my tongue Your thoughts define me, You're inside me You're my reality.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You came running down my prodigal road You came running with a ring and a robe Grace is the collision on the way back home With the arms of a Father who won't let go.
